name: ong-matching-animal
description: Sistema de matching entre tutores e animais para ONGs

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix src/backend" "npm run dev --prefix src/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix src/backend && npm run build --prefix src/frontend
scripts.install: npm install --prefix src/backend && npm install --prefix src/frontend
scripts.test: npm test --prefix src/backend && npm test --prefix src/frontend
